event_summary: After production recovery, the team handled a tote removal issue and discussed bagout/shutdown implications, including that parcels had been removed by hand and bagout might be needed for proper labels; AGV map changes were cautioned to require pause/E-stop conditions.
action_taken: Support discussed safe handling of tote/bagout state and AGV map edits.
outcome: Immediate tote issue was reportedly fixed, but operational cleanup questions remained.

extraction_notes: This event combines a coherent investigation update with linked visual evidence from alarm screenshots.
timestamp_basis: investigation findings documented in Teams with explicit timestamps; underlying alarm times from 4/7 21:15
event_summary: Investigation linked the incident to repeated hospital lane and controller connection resets and identified a 4/7 21:15 GLD1 connection fault attributed in discussion to ethernet failure, aligned with alarm evidence showing tipper E-stop, RIO Module Ethernet Failure, ClearLink communication loss, VFD not detected, and IO Link Master not detected.
action_taken: Support reviewed Ignition logs and visual alarm evidence and summarized likely fault window.
outcome: Investigation produced a candidate communications fault timeline but not a validated root cause.

actor: Wesley Saunders / Mitchel Flynn / Todd Fuchs
event_summary: Later-day analysis found comms loss for OP station 3 (.156) with keep-alive failure and connection reset evidence, noted GLD1 (.248) had faulted the prior night, and proposed network degradation as the best current explanation; manual Ignition reset was then used to observe behavior and heartbeats were reestablished.
action_taken: Support reviewed logs, formed a candidate diagnosis, and manually reset Ignition to observe recovery behavior.
outcome: Heartbeats returned and investigation shifted toward communications resilience and logging improvements.

Salesforce later shows the case moved to RCA Pending and was closed on 4/22/2026 with restart documented as the resolution while root cause investigation continued.
